items.title: Parking control tower convergence Initiative
items.description: Parking control tower convergence Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Paid session conversion rate and Parking platform ARR, anchored in multimodal interoperability, ticketing consistency, and settlement clarity across city partners and led through Parking Configuration & Policy Management with reusable tariff and permit models.. The quarter concentrates on account-based ticketing, multimodal settlement, and partner interoperability across urban mobility systems so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase paid session conversion rate by strengthening parking configuration & policy management with reusable tariff and permit models and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Decrease violation resolution cycle time by improving parking configuration & policy management with reusable tariff and permit models and removing avoidable workflow friction.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase parking platform arr by strengthening parking configuration & policy management with reusable tariff and permit models and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Parking Configuration & Policy Management with reusable tariff and permit models.
Extended Payment Channel Orchestration with cleaner consistency rules across mobile, kiosk, and partner channels.
Extended Access, Permit & LPR Control with stronger event handling and permit validation.
Extended Enforcement & Compliance Workflows with better citation evidence and exception routing.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced consolidated policy and enforcement workflows in Operator Control Console.
Introduced cross-channel yield and compliance tracking in Parking KPI Cockpit.
Introduced rule-consistent payment and access behaviors in Parking Operations API.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Parking control tower convergence: operating discovery

items.title: Transit open-payment reliability Initiative
items.description: Transit open-payment reliability Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Tap success rate and Processed payment volume, anchored in multimodal interoperability, ticketing consistency, and settlement clarity across city partners and led through Transit Fare & Open Payment Engine with stronger best-fare and failure-handling logic.. The quarter concentrates on account-based ticketing, multimodal settlement, and partner interoperability across urban mobility systems so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase tap success rate by strengthening transit fare & open payment engine with stronger best-fare and failure-handling logic and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase fare capture rate by strengthening transit fare & open payment engine with stronger best-fare and failure-handling logic and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase processed payment volume by strengthening transit fare & open payment engine with stronger best-fare and failure-handling logic and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Transit Fare & Open Payment Engine with stronger best-fare and failure-handling logic.
Extended Device & Validator Management with better field visibility and maintenance-state control.
Extended Transit Operations Telemetry with faster alerting on payment and device anomalies.
Extended Settlement, Ledger & Revenue Reconciliation with clearer transport-payment exception workflows.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced faster exception and rollout-control workflows in Transit Operations Console.
Introduced validator reliability and configuration updates in the device estate.
Introduced tap and revenue-health visibility in Transit Revenue Board.
